name: Pogo Knight
short_description: Bounce your way to the top and claim victory... How hard could it be?
detailed_description:
Prepare for a medieval test of skill and patience! In Pogo Knight, you'll guide a valiant knight through treacherous environments, armed with nothing but a trusty(and bouncy) pogo sword! Your mission: navigate these challenging terrains, overcome dangerous obstacles and reach the crown to claim your title as king.

Key features:

- Precision Pogoing: Master the art of bouncing with your pogo sword, timing and direction are key to conquering overwhelming obstacles.

- Challenging 3D landscapes: Explore a variety of unique environments, such as towering castles and treacherous sewers designed to push your skill to the limit.

- Strategic Checkpoints: Hit crucial checkpoints to save your progress and reduce the sting of each fall.

- Epic Knightly Aesthetic: Armour-Clad and determined, our knight bounces into battle with a noble cause, ascending to the top!

Do you have what it takes to guide the knight to victory, or will the challenge ahead prove too daunting?
